items.title: hermes-agent
items.description: The agent that grows with you
items.description_zh: 与您共同成长的代理商

items.title: headroom
items.description: Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server.
items.description_zh: 在工具输出、日志、文件和 RAG 块到达 LLM 之前对其进行压缩。减少 60-95% 的标记，答案相同。库、代理、MCP 服务器。

items.title: CopilotKit
items.description: The Frontend Stack for Agents & Generative UI. React + Angular. Makers of the AG-UI Protocol
items.description_zh: 代理和生成式 UI 的前端堆栈。反应+角度。 AG-UI协议的制定者

items.title: open-notebook
items.description: An Open Source implementation of Notebook LM with more flexibility and features
items.description_zh: Notebook LM 的开源实现，具有更多灵活性和功能

items.title: ECC
items.description: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
items.description_zh: 代理利用性能优化系统。 Claude Code、Codex、Opencode、Cursor 等的技能、直觉、记忆、安全性和研究优先的开发。

items.title: Agent-Reach
items.description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.
items.description_zh: 让您的人工智能代理有一双能够看到整个互联网的眼睛。阅读和搜索 Twitter、Reddit、YouTube、GitHub、Bilibili、小红书 — 一个 CLI，零 API 费用。

items.title: cosmos
items.description: NVIDIA Cosmos is an open platform of world models, datasets, and tools that enables developers to build Physical AI for robots, autonomous vehicles, smart infrastructure, and more.
items.description_zh: NVIDIA Cosmos 是一个包含世界模型、数据集和工具的开放平台，使开发人员能够为机器人、自动驾驶车辆、智能基础设施等构建物理 AI。

items.title: MiroFish
items.description: A Simple and Universal Swarm Intelligence Engine, Predicting Anything. 简洁通用的群体智能引擎，预测万物
items.description_zh: 一个简单且通用的群体智能引擎，可以预测任何事情。 简洁通用的群体智能引擎，预测万物

items.title: last30days-skill
items.description: AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary
items.description_zh: AI 代理技能可研究 Reddit、X、YouTube、HN、Polymarket 和网络上的任何主题，然后综合得出有根据的摘要

items.title: PaddleOCR
items.description: Turn any PDF or image document into structured data for your AI. A powerful, lightweight OCR toolkit that bridges the gap between images/PDFs and LLMs. Supports 100+ languages.
items.description_zh: 将任何 PDF 或图像文档转换为 AI 的结构化数据。一款功能强大、轻量级的 OCR 工具包，可弥合图像/PDF 和LLM之间的差距。支持 100 多种语言。

items.title: mempalace
items.description: The best-benchmarked open-source AI memory system. And it's free.
items.description_zh: 最佳基准的开源人工智能存储系统。而且它是免费的。

items.title: openclaw-windows-node
items.description: Windows companion suite for OpenClaw - System Tray app, Shared library, Node, and PowerToys Command Palette extension
items.description_zh: OpenClaw 的 Windows 配套套件 - 系统托盘应用程序、共享库、节点和 PowerToys 命令面板扩展

items.title: trivy
items.description: Find vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, secrets, SBOM in containers, Kubernetes, code repositories, clouds and more
items.description_zh: 查找容器、Kubernetes、代码存储库、云等中的漏洞、错误配置、秘密、SBOM

items.title: coding-interview-university
items.description: A complete computer science study plan to become a software engineer.
items.description_zh: 成为软件工程师的完整计算机科学研究计划。
